description: Electronic Arts Inc., commonly referred to as EA, is an American video game developer, publisher, and distributor of video games based in Redwood City, California, and a member of the S&P 400 index.
vision_statement: To inspire a love of play and bring people together through the power of games.
mission_statement: To delight our players and investors through a relentless commitment to innovation, quality, and fun.

core_values.Innovation: We innovate and experiment to stay ahead of the curve.
core_values.Quality: We strive for excellence in everything we do.
core_values.Fun: We make games that bring joy and excitement to our players.
core_values.Collaboration: We work together as a team to achieve our goals.
core_values.Accountability: We take ownership of our actions and their consequences.

sales_motion: Electronic Arts Inc. (EA) is a leading global interactive entertainment company that delivers games, content, and online services for internet-connected consoles, mobile devices, and personal computers.
exit_strategy_history: EA has a history of successful acquisitions and divestitures, including the sale of its EA Mobile business to Glu Mobile in 2011.
carbon_footprint: EA has set a goal to achieve net-zero carbon emissions by 2040 and has made significant progress in reducing its carbon footprint through renewable energy investments and energy-efficient practices.
ethical_sourcing: EA has a strong commitment to responsible sourcing and has implemented various initiatives to ensure the responsible sourcing of materials and labor practices.
case_studies: EA's partnership with the National Football League (NFL)
sustainability_csr: EA has a strong commitment to sustainability and corporate social responsibility (CSR) and has made significant progress in reducing its environmental impact and promoting social responsibility.
crisis_behavior: EA has a well-established crisis management plan and has demonstrated a strong commitment to transparency and accountability in the face of crises, including the 2018 controversy surrounding its treatment of former NFL player Colin Kaepernick.
